title: Lore plugin
description: You can add a lore to item by one command
body:
# Lore Signer
Description:
Adds player signatures to item lore with name, date, and custom message. Replaces old signatures by the same player.

## Features:

Sign items with /lore <text>
Includes player name and signing date
Replaces previous signature if exists
Color-coded, clean lore display
Lightweight and easy to use

## Usage:

/lore <text> — Signs your held item with the provided text.
